heading: Funding
label: 80p Funding
notes: Effective DateSection effective, except for the provisions in subsec. (b) of this section, on the date of transfer of a deed or other instrument under the provisions of , see , set out as a note under .section 80k of this titlesection 7 of Pub. L. 95–414section 80k of this title

children.heading: Federal funds for Museum
children.label: a Federal funds for Museum
children.text: The faith of the United States is pledged that upon the completion of the acquisition in , the United States will provide such funds as may be necessary for the upkeep of the Museum and the administrative expenses and costs of operation thereof, including the protection and care of works of art acquired by the Board, so the Museum shall at all times be properly maintained and works of art contained therein shall be exhibited regularly to the general public free of charge.section 80k of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated for the first fiscal year under this subchapter, the sum of $1,000,000 and such amounts as may be necessary for the succeeding fiscal years in order to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.
